Name: SKELETON_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for character skeleton and foot inverse kinematics .

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Priority
Fields.Description: The lower it is, the faster it will turn. -1 does not turn the head.

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Maximum Rotation
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation angle for this joint. Can't bend beyond this angle.

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Gain
Fields.Description: The amount of gain for neck turning. The higher the value, the faster it turns.
